rootCause: The quest claim tracking helpers accessed gameState.quests[questId].itemsClaimed without guarding missing quest progress, so first-time claim attempts threw before saving claim state. grantsItems options kept granting inventory on each click because addItems ran before the claim mark persisted.
resolution: Updated quest progress writes to merge existing per-quest state, guarded missing quest objects for claim reads/writes, and added regression tests covering first-time grantsItems claims and preservation of quest-specific fields when saving dialogue progress.
